en.extract:
The Kolombangara white-eye or hermit white-eye (Zosterops murphyi) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands.

The '''[[Kolombangara]] white-eye''' or '''hermit white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops murphyi''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Solomon Islands]].
